zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell於1281年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾時，她的父親Henry De Erdington7歲，母親Joan de Wolvey1歲。她於1294年與Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1370年在英國史洛普爾阿爾維勒享年89歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾阿爾維勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell于1281年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾时，她的父亲Henry De Erdington7岁，母亲Joan de Wolvey1岁。她于1294年与Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1370年在英国史洛普爾阿爾維勒享年89岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾阿爾維勒。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Erdington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Edington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Edington in Northumberland, Somerset, and Wiltshire, or from Eddington, Berkshire. Edington in Northumberland arises from Old English Idingtūn, from the Old English personal name Ida, + ing, denoting association, + tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Ida ). In Somerset, the name comes either from the Old English male name Ēadwine or from the feminine Ēadwynn + ing + tūn. Edington (Wiltshire) is from either the Old English personal name Ētha + dūn ‘hill’, or from Old English ēthe ‘uncultivated’ + dūn.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell was born in 1281, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry De Erdington, was 7 and her mother, Joan de Wolvey, was 1. She married Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight in 1294, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1370, in Alveley, Shropshire, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Alveley, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell est née en 1281, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry De Erdington, avait 7 ans et sa mère, Joan de Wolvey, avait 1 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight en 1294, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1370, à Alveley, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Alveley, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell 1281 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry De Erdington 7 und ihre Mutter Joan de Wolvey 1. Sie hat 1294 in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1370 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Alveley, Shropshire, England und wurde in Alveley, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell è nata il nel 1281 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry De Erdington, aveva 7 anni e sua madre, Joan de Wolvey, aveva 1 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight nel 1294, nel Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1370, nel Alveley, Shropshire, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Alveley, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwellが1281年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry De Erdingtonは7歳，母Joan de Wolveyは1歳であった。1294年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムでSir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1370年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルベリーで89歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアアルベリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell(이)가 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry De Erdington(은)는 7세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Wolvey(은)는 1세였다. 그녀는 1294년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1370년 영국 슈럽실르 앨벨리에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 앨벨리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell nasceu em 1281, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry De Erdington, tinha 7 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Wolvey, tinha 1 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight em 1294, em Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1370, em Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell родилась в 1281 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry De Erdington было 7 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Wolvey, 1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight в 1294 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1370 г. в местности алвели, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности алвели, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda De Erdington Of Chilwell nació en 1281, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry De Erdington, tenía 7 años y su mamá, Joan de Wolvey, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Sir John Hamlyn of Chittleford Knight en 1294, en Wymondham, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1370, en Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
